name: python3-tqdm
title: python3-tqdm
summary: fast, extensible progress bar for Python 3 and CLI tool
description:
fast, extensible progress bar for Python 3 and CLI tool
tqdm (read taqadum, تقدّم) means “progress” in Arabic.  tqdm instantly makes
your loops show a smart progress meter, just by wrapping any iterable with
"tqdm(iterable)".
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of tqdm and its command-line tool.

commands.description: fast, extensible progress bar for Python and CLI

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use tqdm because fast, extensible progress bar for Python 3 and CLI tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use tqdm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `tqdm [options]` as documented upstream for tqdm.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair tqdm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `tqdm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
